introSection: Flight of the Hippogriff (Japanese: フライト・オブ・ザ・ヒッポグリフ) is a steel roller coaster located at Universal Studios Japan in Osaka, Osaka,  Japan.
fullText: Flight of the Hippogriff (Japanese: フライト・オブ・ザ・ヒッポグリフ) is a steel roller coaster located at Universal Studios Japan in Osaka, Osaka,  Japan.
